input: Run spa routing on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected spa routing output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the spa routing workflow

input: Apply spa routing to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive spa routing analysis with evidence-tagged findings

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to spa routing
